description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant with broad, pointed green leaves that have subtle light green and yellowish variegation. The leaves are arranged in a dense, outward-spreading cluster, giving the plant a lush and healthy appearance. The stems are short and mostly hidden by the foliage, emerging from a simple, round, dark reddish-brown pot. The pot itself is plain, with a smooth surface and no visible decorative elements or patterns. The plant resembles a common houseplant species often used for decorative purposes in urban environments. There are no visible labels, tags, or additional accessories attached to the pot or plant.
description: A lush potted plant with broad, variegated green leaves in a plain, dark reddish-brown pot. The foliage is dense and spreads outward, giving a healthy, decorative look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dense, outward-spreading leaves with the pot partially visible beneath the foliage.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the overlapping leaves and reveals more of the pot's side, showing its plain, smooth surface.
description_view_2: The leaves appear slightly more layered, with the pot less visible due to the foliage's coverage.
description_view_3: A side view with the largest leaves in the foreground, partially obscuring the pot and showing the plant's fullness.
attribute_plant_species: Dieffenbachia (dumb cane) or similar broad-leaf houseplant
